prompt: Can you show me the paragraph that comes right after this one in a document?

bedrock.response_text:
I would be glad to assist you with this, but I need the source material to accurately identify the passage that follows yours. My search results did not retrieve any specific document or text matching your request, which means I do not currently have access to the reference you are working with.

To proceed efficiently, please provide one of the following:
- The exact text of the paragraph you are currently referencing
- The document, file, or a direct link where the text is hosted
- The full title, author, and edition/publication year of the source

Once you supply these details, I will promptly locate and present the paragraph that immediately follows. If you are working within a specific course reader, textbook, or journal article, noting the chapter or page range will also help me verify the sequence accurately.

bedrock.response_basis: The model correctly identifies the missing context, avoids fabrication, and politely requests the necessary document or text to fulfill the request.
bedrock.retrieval_basis: The retrieved chunks consist of disjointed prompt instructions and UI logs that bear no relation to a standard document containing sequential paragraphs.

papers.response_basis: The response is completely empty, failing to address the prompt or ask for clarification.
papers.retrieval_basis: The retrieval output contains only metadata and search parameters with no actual document text or paragraph content.

papers_semantic.response_basis: The response is completely empty, providing no assistance or clarification request.
papers_semantic.retrieval_basis: Similar to the papers source, only metadata and search parameters are returned without any relevant document text.
